name: Banana-Walnut Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Walnuts or pecans (toasted and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add ingredients to the bread machine according to the manufacturer's directions, making sure to add the mashed banana with the milk.
2. Use the light setting if available.
